description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and everyone of its creations. That and the colour makes this pink polka dot dress a must buy for the summer. Wear it with simple flats and understated accesories for a simple and fashionable day out look.  Product Details  Blue sleeveless dress with white polka dots, has a round neckline, a half buttoned placket, flaring pin tucks from waist down on either side of the placket, A line shape and a curved hemline   Material and Care Cotton  Gentle machine wash  Do not bleach and tumble dry low  Use cold iron   Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 81 cm from shoulder to hem Style NoteRemanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and everyone of its creations.
